taxonomy: Artanthe variegata is classified in the family Urticaceae, commonly known as the nettle family. This family is a group of flowering plants that also includes stinging nettles and figworts. The Urticaceae family is part of the order Urticales, which also includes several other plant families. The Urticales order is a group of flowering plants that are primarily found in tropical and subtropical regions. Artanthe variegata is a species of flowering plant within this order and family.
